summary: Iteration 5: full E2E coverage of the new Monthly Reports feature (admin-only). Backend pytest suite (10/10 PASS) covers preview JSON shape, agent_id scope label, 401/403 guards, month=0/13 validation, PDF binary integrity (Content-Type, Content-Disposition filename, %PDF magic bytes, >1KB), and activity_logs persistence with action='report_generated'. Frontend Playwright run validates: nav-reports visible only for admin, /reports page renders all required selectors (report-month/year/agent/refresh, top-docs-card, top-agents-card, download-pdf-btn), refresh fetches preview, download-pdf-btn triggers a real PDF download with filename rapport-mhcged-2026-05.pdf, agent role has nav-reports hidden AND is redirected away from /reports to /. All scenarios green.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup') (carry-over from previous iterations) - migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager.

_build_report_data: timestamp is stored as ISO string and matched via $gte/$lt against ISO strings - works lexicographically because ISO 8601 is sortable, but switching to native datetime in Mongo would be safer and faster (and would let Mongo use date indexes). Low priority.

report_monthly_pdf logs activity AFTER successfully streaming - if the StreamingResponse is consumed but the activity insert fails, the client still gets the PDF; acceptable but worth a try/except log. The current test 'report_generated' assertion passes because the insert happens before StreamingResponse is iterated (the await log_activity runs before return).
reports.py LOGO_URL is fetched on every PDF request (10s timeout) - consider caching the bytes in-process to avoid latency / external dependency on every download.
Reports.jsx 'download-pdf-btn' uses fetch + blob + URL.createObjectURL pattern (works) but lacks a loading/disabled state during the (~1s) PDF generation - minor UX nit.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted a transient agent uitest_agent_768438@example.com during the run; residual was cleaned via API. Backend test fixture creates/deletes a TEST_rep_agent_<uuid>@mhcged.cg per module.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports feature is fully green. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_reports.py and use module-scoped admin_session + temp_agent fixtures. PDF endpoint returns ~1MB binary that starts with %PDF and has Content-Disposition attachment with filename rapport-mhcged-YYYY-MM.pdf. Activity logs endpoint is /api/activity (NOT /api/activity-logs) and returns a list directly. Frontend selectors confirmed: nav-reports, reports-page, report-month/year/agent, report-refresh, top-docs-card, top-agents-card, download-pdf-btn.
